channel.title: Tool | Ian Buller, PhD, MA
channel.copyright: © Ian Buller, 2026 · Opinions expressed are my own

item.title: New Web Application "Catchment Areas of NCI-Designated Cancer Centers" launched
item.description:
Catchment Areas of NCI-Designated Cancer Centers is a web-based application that serves as a visualization tool for the geographically defined catchment areas of NCI-Designated Cancer Centers.

The web application provides a geographic scope for:

  • monitoring cancer trends
  • identifying pronounced socioeconomic- and health-related disparities
  • informing high-impact translational science
  • guiding the implementation of evidence-based interventions in clinical and community settings

The web application will continue to evolve, geographically linking Cancer Centers’ catchment areas to publicly available data sources to aggregate sociodemographic and epidemiologic characteristics across the NCI Cancer Centers Program. I co-led the tool development with Dr. Peter DelNero with guidance from Dr. Zaria Tatalovich and Dr. Robin Vanderpool and technical assistance from Information Management Services, Inc..

item.title: New Web Application "Spatial Power" launched
item.description:
Spatial Power is a web application that calculates the power for spatial statistics. Currently, the tool has one module for the spatial relative risk function.

Dr. Derek Brown and I co-designed the web application with a development team from the NCI Center for Biomedical Informatics & Information Technology. We received funding from a DCEG Informatics Tool Challenge Award and a DCP Trans-Fellowship Research Award Supplement. Please contact me or Dr. Brown with any suggestions for improvements, especially additional spatial statistics you would like to see in the web application.
